title: Productivity

title: Home
meta_description: Listenote helps teams turn meeting transcripts into summaries, decisions, and action items with an AI-powered meeting notes workflow.

blocks.title: Turn every meeting into clear notes and next steps.

children.text: Listenote transforms meeting transcripts into concise summaries, key decisions, and action items your team can actually use.

blocks.title: Plans that scale with your team
blocks.description: Start with essentials for solo builders, then grow into collaborative workspaces and enterprise controls as Listenote becomes your meeting memory.
blocks.footnote: All plans include unlimited transcript uploads during the demo period.

title: Introduced AI Action Insights
summary: Surface the most critical follow-ups automatically with AI-powered action grouping and ownership suggestions.
highlights: Action items grouped by team and urgency
Ownership suggestions based on meeting metadata

children.text: Action Insights helps teams prioritize post-meeting work by grouping tasks by urgency, function, and assignee recommendations.

title: Refreshed Mini Admin Dashboard
summary: Rolled out a streamlined admin dashboard with Sanity-backed controls for changelog, pricing previews, and AI demo content.
highlights: Activity feed to track recent edits

children.text: Admins can now schedule changelog posts, review pricing tiers, and curate AI demo samples without leaving the Listenote dashboard.

title: Weekly Product Sync
meetingContext: 30-minute standup with product, design, and engineering leads reviewing roadmap updates.
transcript: Thanks everyone for joining the weekly product sync. Let's confirm the onboarding revamp timeline, QA readiness for the mobile release, and assign follow-ups for the AI insights launch. Design will share final mockups Tuesday, mobile needs a regression pass before ship, and we should update release comms with the new insight cards. Please flag any blockers in Slack before end of day.
expectedSummary: Team validated the onboarding schedule, flagged mobile QA risks, and outlined follow-ups to polish AI insights before launch.
expectedActionItems: Design team to deliver final onboarding mockups by Tuesday
Mobile squad to run regression suite and report blockers
AI task force to update release comms with new insight cards
demoTips: Highlight how Listenote extracts responsibilities automatically and allows one-click export to Notion.

title: Production Demo
systemPrompt: You are Listenote, an assistant that reads meeting transcripts and produces concise summaries and actionable tasks for busy product teams.
postProcessingInstructions: Return JSON with summary, keyDecisions, and actionItems arrays for rendering cards in the UI.

notes: Primary curator for marketing and demo content.
